name: inventory-alert-trigger-skill
description: Calculates safety thresholds and generates warnings when current stock levels drop near threshold levels based on daily velocity rates.
author: alphaparkinc

lead_time_days.description: Supplier restock lead time in days.

days_of_stock_left.description: Estimated days until inventory is exhausted.

alert_triggered.description: True if current stock is below reorder point.
